title: The Basics
description: The most essential mods in minecraft. Much better performance and some other features.
body:
# The Basics Modpack

Welcome to **The Basics**, a _lightweight modpack_ designed to enhance your Minecraft experience with **essential features**, performance improvements, and quality-of-life additions—perfect for players who want a refined vanilla-like gameplay without ~~overwhelming complexity~~.

## Features

This modpack includes a curated selection of mods to improve performance, visuals, and gameplay mechanics:

### Performance Boosts

> Mods like `FerriteCore`, `Lithium`, `Sodium`, and `Entity Culling` optimize your game, reducing lag and improving FPS for smoother gameplay.

1. `FerriteCore 8.0.0-fabric` for efficient memory usage.  
2. `Lithium mc1.21.5-0.16.2-fabric`  
3. `Sodium mc1.21.5-0.6.13-fabric`  
4. `Entity Culling 1.7.4`

### Visual Enhancements

Enjoy _better graphics_ and shaders with:

- `Iris Shaders 1.8.11+1.21.5-fabric` for **stunning shader support**.  
- `AppleSkin 3.0.6+mc1.21.5` for a sleek food and saturation HUD.

### Gameplay Improvements

- `Mod Menu 14.0.0-rc.2` for _easy mod management_.  
- `Text Placeholder API 2.6.2+1.21.5` for dynamic text customization.  
- `Essential Mod 1.3.5.12` for seamless multiplayer features.  
- `Cubes Without Borders 3.0.0+1.21.5` for a cleaner block rendering experience.  
- `Dynamic FPS 3.9.3` to save resources when the game is in the background.  
- `Jade 18.2.0-fabric` for detailed block and entity information on hover.  
- `kennytv’s-epic-force-close-loading-screen-mod-for-fabric 2.2.3` to instantly close the loading screen for faster transitions.

### Development and Utility

<details>
<summary>Click to reveal development mods</summary>

- `Fabric Language Kotlin 1.13.2+kotlin.2.1.20` for mod compatibility.  
- `Resourceify 1.7.1` for resource pack management.  
- `ViaFabricPlus 4.1.2` for cross-version multiplayer support.

</details>

### Animation and Culling

- `Not Enough Animations 1.9.3` adds subtle animations to **enhance immersion**.  
- `Entity Culling 1.7.4` _ensures only visible entities are rendered_, boosting performance.

## Installation

1. Download the modpack from Modrinth.  
2. Double click on the file.  
3. Done, ready to play.

## Compatibility

This modpack is built for **Minecraft 1.21.5** using the Fabric mod loader. Most mods are Fabric-based, ensuring smooth compatibility.

## Support

> If you encounter any issues, feel free to reach out on the Modrinth page or check the individual mod pages for more details.
